import asyncio

async def handle_connection(reader, writer):
    asyncio.create_task(heartbeat(writer))
    data = await reader.read(1024)
    writer.write(data)
    await writer.drain()
    writer.close()

async def start_background_workers():
    asyncio.create_task(process_queue())
    asyncio.create_task(cleanup_stale_entries())
    asyncio.create_task(sync_remote_state())

async def on_message_received(message):
    asyncio.create_task(log_message(message))
    asyncio.create_task(update_metrics(message))
    result = await process_message(message)
    return result

async def periodic_sync():
    while True:
        asyncio.create_task(fetch_updates())
        await asyncio.sleep(60)
